app.title: AI-SubTrans
app.subtitle: AI Subtitle Translation & Editor
app.dragHint: or drag files into this window

subtitle.exportSrtNoStyleHint: SRT/VTT do not support styles, only ASS can configure size/color/effects
subtitle.streamEditEmpty: All subtitle streams removed, keep at least one
subtitle.streamEditAtLeastOne: Keep at least one subtitle stream
subtitle.streamEditConfirmHint: This action cannot be undone. Confirm save?
subtitle.resetConfirm: {{count}} operation(s) will be undone and subtitles restored to initial state. Are you sure?
subtitle.offsetExceedMsg: {{count}} subtitle(s) end time exceed video duration by {{seconds}} seconds. Apply anyway?

ffmpegRequired.title: FFmpeg Component Required
ffmpegRequired.message: Subtitle extraction and video processing require the FFmpeg component. It is a free open-source tool. Once downloaded, everything will work normally. Please proceed with confidence.

subtitle.emptyHint: Open a subtitle file or extract from video
subtitle.playFromHereHint: Play video from this subtitle's start time

translate.title: Translate
translate.autoTranslateAfterExtract: Auto-translate after extraction (no glossary review needed)
translate.glossaryDesc: AI has extracted the following proper nouns and suggested translations. Review and edit them; they will be used across all translation batches for consistency.
translate.nameExtractDoneNoTranslate: Proper noun extraction complete. Glossary saved. You can translate manually later.
translate.configInSettings: Please configure translation API in settings
translate.networkError: Translation network error: {{detail}}. Possible causes: no network, proxy required, or firewall blocking
translate.timeout: {{provider}} translation timed out (no response in {{timeoutSecs}}s), task stopped. Check network or switch model
translate.alignFailed: Translation alignment failed, {{missing}} entries marked as failed
translate.placeholderBroken: Subtitle #{{index}} placeholder broken, style tags may be lost
translate.engineSwitched: Previous engine ({{oldProvider}}) is no longer available, switched to {{newProvider}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.proxyModeDesc: For improving network connectivity to some translation services
settings.openaiBaseUrlDesc: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1 or https://api.deepseek.com/v1
settings.openaiNoMatch: No matching models, click to refresh
settings.openaiClickRefresh: No models yet, click to refresh
settings.openaiBaseUrlRequired: Please enter the API URL first
settings.openaiFetchTimeout: Request timed out, please check the URL
settings.openaiModelDesc: Select or enter model ID. Click the button to fetch list from server.
settings.openaiDefaultModelDesc: Default model for translation, switchable in translate panel
settings.openaiModelTypeDesc: Affects prompt template selection, usually auto-detected
settings.openaiApiKeyDesc: Leave empty for LAN deployment; required for cloud API, stored in keyring
settings.openaiApiKeyRequiredDesc: Required, stored encrypted in system keyring
settings.deleteConfigDesc: This will clear all settings and credentials for the current engine. This action cannot be undone.
settings.addTraditionalServiceDesc: Add Baidu Translate and other traditional translation services
settings.addAiServiceDesc: Add DeepSeek and other AI large models
settings.noServicesToAdd: No services to add (all added or no search match)
settings.officialApiJingyiDesc: Specially optimized for subtitle translation, quality close to fansub level.
settings.officialApiZhongzhuanDesc: Relays to DeepSeek during off-peak hours to save costs. Charged at official pricing, no profit.
settings.officialApiMianfeiDesc: Forwards to the author's computer, using Qwen 3.5 9B for translation. Slow but completely free.
settings.officialApiLoginPrompt: Log in to use the official API service.
settings.officialApiLoginNote: (Login authentication is not yet implemented in this version. Clicking redirects to Baidu. Will be replaced with official auth in future versions.)
settings.qpsDesc: Max concurrent requests per second for this service. Preset value is a reference, adjust to your plan.
settings.useProxyDesc: Access this translation API via the configured proxy
settings.useProxyNoProxy: No proxy configured, please configure one in Advanced settings first
settings.secretKeyRequired: Please fill in the API Key
settings.appIdRequired: Please fill in the App ID
settings.appIdDesc: App ID / API Key for the translation service
settings.secretKeyDesc: API secret key, encrypted in system keychain
settings.regionDesc: Azure region, e.g. global or china
settings.searchDesc: Configure OpenSubtitles API key to enable online subtitle search
settings.apiKeyDesc: Register at opensubtitles.com to get an API key
settings.playerDesc: Manage FFmpeg and libmpv video components
settings.advancedDesc: FFmpeg path, cache cleanup, context menu registration
settings.videoContextMenuDesc: Add "Quick Translate" option to video file right-click menu
settings.subtitleContextMenuDesc: Add "Edit Subtitle" option to subtitle file right-click menu
settings.devModeClickHint: Click 7 times to toggle developer mode
settings.devModeEnableHint: {{count}} more clicks to enable developer mode
settings.devModeDisableHint: {{count}} more clicks to disable developer mode
settings.qpsDescTraditional: Max request rate for this service. Free tier is typically 1-5, paid plans can be higher.
settings.maybeFreeTooltip: May be free, check official pricing
settings.folderContextMenuDesc: Add "Batch Translate" option to folder right-click menu, auto-monitor directory
settings.saveSuccessButCredential: Configuration saved, but credential save failed (keyring may not be supported)
settings.crashLogsDesc: Log files are automatically generated when the program crashes, used for diagnostics.
settings.promptFailLogsDesc: Automatically records sent prompts and model responses when translation alignment fails, for diagnosing translation issues.
settings.apiDebugLogsDesc: When enabled, records all translation API requests and responses. Only effective in developer mode.
settings.apiDebugRequiresDevMode: Enable developer mode first to use this feature
settings.devtoolsDesc: Open browser developer tools to view console logs, network requests, and elements.
settings.namePrecisionDesc: Automatically scans subtitles before translation to extract proper nouns, builds a unified glossary injected into each translation batch for cross-batch consistency. Also requires AI to mark proper nouns in translations, automatically detects inconsistencies and corrects them.
settings.namePrecisionFlow1: Pre-scan: One API call before translation extracts proper nouns from all subtitles, auto-segmented by model size
settings.namePrecisionFlow2: Glossary injection: Extracted glossary is injected into each batch's system prompt, all batches use the same glossary
settings.namePrecisionFlow3: Noun marking: AI marks proper nouns in translations with <name=Kaleb>Kaleb</name>, inconsistencies auto-detected after translation
settings.namePrecisionFlow4: Post-processing: When multiple translations of the same noun are found, the most frequent one is selected as standard, globally replaced and tags stripped
settings.namePrecisionCost: Extra overhead: One additional API call before translation (~3-15 seconds), ~5% more token consumption (marking tags)
settings.namePrecisionBenefit: Benefit: Completely resolves cross-batch proper noun inconsistency, especially for educational/documentary videos with nouns introduced across batches
settings.namePrecisionNote: Only supported for AI translation engines. Remains enabled after exiting developer mode, can be toggled off anytime below.
settings.testVersionSaved: Test version saved, click check for updates to apply
settings.testVersionCleared: Test version cleared, restored to real version
settings.updateChannelDesc: Select the update channel. Stable only receives official releases, Nightly receives latest dev builds.
settings.updateChannelNightlyWarn: May be unstable, for testing only
settings.updateCheckFailed: Update check failed, please retry later
settings.testVersionDesc: Enter a version number to simulate an older version for testing update flow. Leave empty to restore real version.
settings.updateChannelNote: Takes effect on next update check (manual check or auto-check after restart).

search.title: Subtitle Search
search.noResults: No subtitles found, try different keywords

search.authFailed: Search API {{provider}} auth failed, check API key
search.notConfigured: Search provider not configured, set API key in settings
search.zimukuHint: Clicking the search button will open the zimuku search page in your browser

update.title: Update Available
update.newVersionAvailable: New version v{{version}} available. Update now?
update.relaunchHint: Application restart is required to complete the update
update.checkFailed: Update check failed, please check your network
